form.formComment: Placed last time (16.43) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 5 lengths. Has two wins and two placings from eight starts from the draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 278m. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 340m at Hobart behind Black Mouse beaten 11 lengths (20.15). Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on March 30 over 278m at this track behind Fishing Yari beaten 4.5 lengths (16.09). Can't recommend in this field.
